name: Delay Timer
description: Waits for a specified amount of time.
python_code:
import asyncio
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

class DelayTimerNode(BaseNode):
    name = "Delay Timer"
    
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.icon_path = "icons/timer.svg"
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-START]
        self.add_input("seconds", "float", widget_type="float")
        self.add_output("done", "bool")
        # [AUTO-GENERATED-PORTS-END]
        
    async def execute(self, inputs):
        try:
            sec = float(inputs.get('seconds', 1.0))
        except (ValueError, TypeError):
            self.log_error(f"Invalid seconds value: {inputs.get('seconds')}. Defaulting to 1.0")
            sec = 1.0
        await asyncio.sleep(sec)
        return {'done': True}

def register_node():
    return DelayTimerNode
